response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience and open-source contributions in geospatial systems, the candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and has no demonstrated work on routing tiles, navigation systems, or low-latency map data transformation — core requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Deep involvement in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling best practices
concerns: No evidence of C++ or Rust development in routing or navigation contexts
No experience with routing tile generation, map data optimization, or real-time traffic integration
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level geospatial pipelines
